markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce the new GrowthX team structure and review November content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New GrowthX Structure:** Jo Kaminska is now the Engagement Manager (strategy, analytics); Jenn Peters leads end-to-end production.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**November Performance:** Steady growth is driven by content refreshes. The "Objection Handling" and "Forecasting Methods" pages have low CTRs, requiring investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [**Webflow Migration:** A migration from Craft CMS to Webflow is planned for December (Q4), with a technical SEO audit scheduled for early January to catch post-migration issues.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [**Q1 Strategy Shift:** Outreach will pivot its content strategy to focus on platforms like Forecasting and Conversation Intelligence, moving beyond its traditional "SDR mind" association.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team Structure

  - [**Jo Kaminska:** Engagement Manager (main point of contact)](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [**Responsibilities:** Strategy, analytics, LLM optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**Jenn Peters:** End-to-end production lead.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [**GrowthX Directors:** Shift to individual contributor roles for high-level strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [**Cade McNelly (Outreach):** New content marketer focused on thought leadership, educational content, and video projects.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

### November Performance Review

  - [**Overall:** Steady week-over-week growth.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [**Average Position:** 10.x → 11.x (expected seasonal dip).](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
      - [**CTR:** Strong across the board.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [**Top Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - ["Working at Outreach"](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - ["Sales Email Templates"](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** Content refreshes are the primary driver of performance.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**Actionable Finding:** "Objection Handling" and "Forecasting Methods" pages have comparatively low CTRs.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [**Plan:** Investigate causes and consider A/B testing page elements (e.g., UX, titles) to improve engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)

### Landing Page Optimization Project

  - [**Status:** The first batch of optimizations met expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Process:** The current spreadsheet-based workflow is effective.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**Future Batches:** Hadassah will confirm the batch size and cadence with the web team to help GrowthX forecast production impact.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### Holiday Content & Scheduling

  - [**Purpose:** Holiday reserve content ensures a steady publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Quiet Week:** No content will be published the week between Christmas and New Year's.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [**Scheduling:** Maria will move reserve content into the review queue. The Outreach team will then decide whether to schedule it for the holiday week or front/backload it around January.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)

### Q1 2026 Strategy & Webflow Migration

  - [**Q1 Strategy Alignment:** Jo will meet with Outreach to align on Q1 priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [**Context:** Outreach is shifting its focus to platforms like Forecasting and Conversation Intelligence to broaden its market perception beyond Sales Engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [**Webflow Migration:**](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [**Timeline:** December (Q4).](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [**Technical SEO:** URLs are expected to mirror the current structure.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
      - [**Design:** The new Creative Director (Chris Fisher) will update the site's look and feel.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will run a technical SEO audit in early January to catch post-migration issues.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [**LLM Performance:** Hadassah requested a performance overview from Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
      - [**Plan:** Jo will analyze the data to optimize LLM strategy, possibly via controlled experiments (e.g., adding FAQs to refreshes and tracking their impact on prompt answers).](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hadassah:** Confirm landing page batch size and cadence with the web team.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [**Hadassah:** Share the final Webflow migration date with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [**Maria:** Move holiday reserve content into the review queue.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [**Outreach Team:** Decide on the publishing schedule for holiday reserve content.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [**Jo:** Prepare the November month-over-month performance review for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [**Jo:** Prepare the Scrunch LLM performance overview for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [**Jo:** Schedule a follow-up with Hadassah to align on Q1 2026 priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/mz-dVKE8zx5x2xbVq9AK2Avu6hBxju3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
